expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Notification Center feature decomposition",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification persistence schema",
      "description": "Create notifications table and read-state storage so read/unread persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notifications table exists with read flag",
        "Migrations added",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "migrations/20260618_create_notifications.sql",
        "src/server/models/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Backend: notification read-state updates",
      "description": "APIs to mark read/unread and to fetch notifications with read state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Endpoints exist for fetch/mark read/unread",
        "State persists",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts",
        "src/server/services/notificationsService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Unread badge and count",
      "description": "Show unread badge count in header and update in real-time as read state changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Badge shows correct unread count",
        "Updates after marking read",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/components/NotificationsBadge.tsx",
        "src/web/state/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Notification list UI",
      "description": "List notifications with content, timestamp, and read state; clicking opens notification.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "List shows notifications ordered by time",
        "Click opens linked resource",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/pages/NotificationsCenter.tsx",
        "src/web/components/NotificationItem.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Read/unread toggle and mark all read",
      "description": "Allow toggling individual read state and clearing all read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Toggle updates backend and UI",
        "Clear all read removes or archives read notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/components/NotificationControls.tsx",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "Filter list by read/unread/all.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter UI works and preserves selection",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/components/Filters.tsx",
        "src/web/pages/NotificationsCenter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
